_README: DRAFT for human review. Agent-authored intents are deliberately neutral (not chosen to flatter the system). REVIEW EVERY intent, confirm every role_type, and rewrite 2-3 intents from scratch so the set is not fully self-authored. Big tables marked cap_rows are pre-sampled deterministically (seed 42) to a fixed file; both arms AND ground truth run on that capped file. Rename to manifest.json once approved.

tables.intent: Which passenger attributes are associated with survival?

tables.file: List of Unicorns in the World.csv
tables.intent: Which countries and industries have the most unicorn companies, and at what valuations?
